# Karouselmaker

> Karouselmaker is an AI-powered carousel maker for Instagram and LinkedIn. Users enter a topic or URL; the app generates swipe carousel slides with AI, then they choose templates and export as images or video. It supports Instagram carousel templates, LinkedIn carousel posts, and importing a template from an image.

## Services

- [App](https://karouselmaker.com): AI carousel generator — create carousels from a topic or link
- [Templates](https://karouselmaker.com/templates): Browse and edit templates for Instagram and LinkedIn carousels
- [Projects](https://karouselmaker.com/projects): Create projects, generate slides, and export

## What We Do Not Do

Karouselmaker does not provide:
- General graphic design or branding services
- Social media management or posting on behalf of users
- Stock photo or asset marketplaces
- Legal or copyright advice

## Contact

- General: support@karouselmaker.com
- Copyright / DMCA: copyright@karouselmaker.com

## Key Information

- [Privacy Policy](https://karouselmaker.com/privacy): Data protection and privacy
- [Terms of Service](https://karouselmaker.com/terms): Website and service terms
- [Copyright](https://karouselmaker.com/copyright): DMCA and copyright policy
